title: Argentinian Hash Browns
description: A gluten-free twist on a classic Argentinian side dish.
instructions: Grate the potatoes and squeeze out excess moisture.
In a bowl, mix together grated potatoes, hash, and creamy cheese.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the mixture to a greased 9x13 inch baking dish.
Brush the top with beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until golden brown.
Let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
